channel.title: Photos on Atomsite
channel.description: Recent content in Photos on Atomsite

item.title: Snow Day 2021
item.description: Snow caked trees by the train tracks Taken 11/28/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f4.6 - 1/125s - ISO 100 The Tetley Stadium, draped in snow Taken 11/28/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f4.6 - 1/250s - ISO 100 A place affectionately called murder alley Taken 11/28/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f4.

item.title: Yorkshire Dales
item.description: The Yorkshire Dales is probably one of the most idyllic places in The North Taken 11/21/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f5.0 - 1/500s - ISO 100 Taken 11/21/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f4.4 - 1/200s - ISO 100 Taken 11/21/21 - Canon EOS 550D - 50mm - f4.

item.title: Paris 2019
item.description: Taken 07/19/19 - Canon EOS 550D - 33mm - f4.6 - 1/100s - ISO 100 Taken 07/19/19 - Canon EOS 550D - 18mm - f5.0 - 1/250s - ISO 100 Taken 07/19/19 - Canon EOS 550D - 24mm - f4.6 - 1/500s - ISO 100 Taken 07/19/19 - Canon EOS 550D - 35mm - f4.
